description: Detailer agent step schemas. Linear 3-step flow: scan-considerer (work) → verify-anchors (verification) → compose-and-post (closure). Closure emits verdict in {handoff-impl, blocked} for outputPhases routing (workflow.json).

iteratorFailureContext.description: Parsed payload from the latest issue comment whose first line is `<!-- iterator-failure-v1 -->`. Null when no such comment exists. Mirrors iterator's iterator_last_failure shape.

closure.detail.scan-considerer.description: Work-step output schema for closure.detail.scan-considerer. Read-only scan of issue body, considerer comment, and iterator-failure anchored comment. Always emits next or repeat (no verdict).

considerer_comment_body.description: Full markdown body of the latest considerer comment (the one that begins with '## 検討結果'). Null if no such comment exists.

issue_acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria / requirements extracted from the issue body. Empty array when none are stated.

closure.detail.verify-anchors.description: Verification-step output schema for closure.detail.verify-anchors. Records anchor existence facts; never decides verdict (terminal compose-and-post step does).

anchor_verification_results.description: One entry per file path / symbol mentioned in the considerer comment. exists=true means Glob/Grep located the artifact; exists=false means it could not be located.

anchor.description: The literal anchor string from the considerer comment (file path or symbol name).

kind.description: Whether this anchor is a file path or a code symbol (function/type/class name).

exists.description: True if Glob (kind=file) or Grep (kind=symbol) located the anchor in the repository.

missing_anchors.description: Subset of anchor_verification_results where exists=false. Empty array means every anchor was located.

closure.detail.compose-and-post.description: Closure-step output schema for closure.detail.compose-and-post. Composes a 5-section Implementation Spec, posts exactly one gh issue comment, and emits the routing verdict.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of what was specified.

action.description: Closure intent. Always 'closing' for terminal step.

verdict.description: Verdict propagated to orchestrator. 'handoff-impl' = all five spec sections filled (Summary / Changes / Approach / Acceptance Criteria / Test Plan) AND every cited anchor exists. 'blocked' = specification not possible (missing considerer input, untargetable files, unmet preconditions, missing anchors).

closure_action.description: Detailer never closes issues itself. Label operations are deferred to the orchestrator via workflow.json labelMapping.

issue.description: GitHub Issue label mutations. Detailer leaves this empty — orchestrator handles phase-driven labelling.

final_summary.description: One-paragraph recap including verdict rationale. Mirrors detail_summary content for downstream/observability handoff parity.

detail_summary.description: One-paragraph recap of the Implementation Spec. Handed off to downstream (iterator) phase on 'handoff-impl'. Required for both verdicts (empty-but-present is not acceptable).

spec_comment_url.description: URL of the posted Implementation Spec comment on the GitHub issue. Null when verdict='blocked' and no comment was posted.

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable reason when verdict='blocked'. Null when verdict='handoff-impl'.
